title: Decision Chain
description: Represents a sequence of operational events connected through causal or temporal relationships.

chain_id.description: Unique identifier for the decision chain

description.description: Optional description of the decision chain

events.description: Ordered list of operational events forming the chain

start_time.description: Timestamp marking the start of the decision chain

end_time.description: Timestamp marking the end of the decision chain

agent_group.description: Optional description of the agents involved in the chain
